notice.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI chain. Insert one

modelSource.description: Choose between on-demand foundation models or inference profiles

onDemand.description: Standard foundation models with on-demand pricing

inferenceProfile.description: Cross-region inference profiles (required for models like Claude Sonnet 4 and others)

model.description: The inference profile which will generate the completion. Learn more.

maxTokensToSample.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

temperature.description: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.
